tions FAQ Download Home Ptolemy II 0.4 beta Ptolemy II 0.4beta Download Skip to sidebar Ptolemy II 0.4 Download This release consists of infrastructure for software developers who want to use Ptolemy to develop models of their own. Note : This is not

to develop models of their own. Note : This is not the most recent version of Ptolemy II. The most recent version can be found at http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/ptolemyII/ptIIlatest/ . Ptolemy II 0.4 requires JDK 1.2., and works best with JDK 1.2.

.4 requires JDK 1.2., and works best with JDK 1.2.2 It will compile and run with JDK1.3rc1, but we have not extensively tested it. Download Gzipped Tar file: ptII0.4beta.src.tar.gz (12.3 Mb). Note that this tar file requires GNU tar or WinZip. Solar

t this tar file requires GNU tar or WinZip. Solaris 2.5.1 tar will fail to untar this file with a checksum error because the pathnames are longer than 100 characters. If you do not have GNU tar, you can obtain source and selected binaries from ftp:

can obtain source and selected binaries from ftp://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/pub/gnu . You can also try the zip version below Zip file: ptII0.4beta.src.zip (15.0 Mb) Experimental Windows Installer ptII04betasetup.exe (15.2Mb) This installer works b

tII04betasetup.exe (15.2Mb) This installer works best with JDK1.2.2. To install, you will likely need Administrator privileges on your machine. After installation, the Ptolemy II menu choice will appear towards the top of your Start -> Programs men

ear towards the top of your Start -> Programs menu. The CLASSPATH and PATH variables are not set because of known bugs in Installshield Java v3.00 The PTII variable is not set by the installer You will need to set the CLASSPATH, PATH and PTII var

will need to set the CLASSPATH, PATH and PTII variables by hand, see ptII0.4beta/doc/install.htm The Ptolemy 0.4 Design Document: ptII0.4beta/doc/design/design.pdf Note an older version of this paper is included in the tar, zip and installer files a

is included in the tar, zip and installer files above. The most recent document has the following text on the title page: Originally published as Memorandum UCB/ERL M99/40 Document Version 0.4, for use with Ptolemy II 0.4beta June 12, 2000 The tar f

se with Ptolemy II 0.4beta June 12, 2000 The tar files include all the .class , .jar and javadoc html documentation, so you need not recompile to use Ptolemy II. This release was compiled with JDK1.2.2 under Solaris 2.5.1 For further information abo

.2 under Solaris 2.5.1 For further information about rebuilding Ptolemy II, see ptII0.4beta/doc/install.htm Feedback Please send any feedback to ptII at eecs berkeley edu. Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all rights reserved.
